caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green tunic with floral embroidery around the neckline and a thin dark necklace. A small microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small gold and red circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman is captured in mid-speech, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting slightly. Her head remains centered in the frame, and her posture stays consistent, with only minor movements in her jaw and cheeks as she talks. The lighting remains steady across all frames, focusing on her face and upper torso.
